tickets.subject: Webhook retries
tickets.body: I notice your webhooks retry 3 times with no jitter. On our side a 3-attempt burst overlaps with our primary DB failover window once a week and we lose the event. Could you add configurable retry spacing, or at least surface the dead-letter queue to customers?
tickets.suggested_reply: Thanks for the detailed feedback on webhook retry behavior. I can see how the current retry burst could cause missed events during your failover window, and I’ll pass along your request for configurable retry spacing and customer-visible dead-letter queue access.
tickets.raw_output: {"urgency":"low","category":"feature_request","suggested_reply":"Thanks for the detailed feedback on webhook retry behavior. I can see how the current retry burst could cause missed events during your failover window, and I’ll pass along your request for configurable retry spacing and customer-visible dead-letter queue access."}
